# ggsegAtlasTrack

AtlasTrack probabilistic white matter fiber tract atlas for the ggseg
ecosystem.

## Installation

We recommend installing the ggseg-atlases through the ggseg
[r-universe](https://ggseg.r-universe.dev/ui#builds):

``` r
options(repos = c(
  ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",
  CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"
))

install.packages("ggsegAtlasTrack")
```

You can install this package from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("ggsegverse/ggsegAtlasTrack")
```

## AtlasTrack

``` r
library(ggseg)
library(ggsegAtlastrack)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot() +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = atlastrack(),
    mapping = aes(fill = label),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void()
```

![](reference/figures/README-atlastrack-1.png)

## Data source

Data obtained from [NITRC](https://www.nitrc.org/projects/atlastrack).

# Package index

## Atlases

- [`atlastrack()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegAtlastrack/reference/atlastrack.md)
  : AtlasTrack Fiber Tract Atlas
